sections.h2: What Is SSTube Save YouTube Video HD Tool?
p: SSTube is a powerful save YouTube video HD tool that allows users to save videos in high quality including 1080p and 4K.
If you want to save YouTube video 4K or HD without installing software, SSTube provides a clean and fast browser-based solution.
Simply paste the video link, process it, and choose your preferred quality to save the video instantly.

sections.h2: How to Save YouTube Video in HD or 4K

p: Open YouTube and copy the URL of the video you want to save in HD or 4K.
Paste the video link into the input box above.
Select HD, 1080p, or 4K depending on the available options.
Save the high-quality YouTube video directly to your device.
Go back to the Save YouTube Video homepage for general video saving.
Use Save YouTube Shorts for short vertical videos.
Visit Save YouTube Audio to extract audio from videos.
